user.title: Häfele Connect Mesh
user.description: Paste the full contents of your Häfele Connect Mesh export file (.connect). Export it from the Häfele Connect app: Menu → Settings → Export Configuration.

adapter.title: Select Bluetooth Adapter
adapter.description: Found {node_count} light(s) in your configuration. Select the Bluetooth adapter to use for mesh communication. Use a USB Bluetooth dongle (hci1) if available for better reliability.

confirm.title: Confirm Configuration
confirm.description:
Ready to set up **{node_count}** light(s):

{node_names}

Using adapter: **{adapter}**
IV Index: **{iv_index}**

Click Submit to connect.

error.invalid_config: Invalid or unrecognized .connect file. Make sure you exported a valid Häfele Connect Mesh configuration.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: Häfele Connect Mesh is already configured.
